target.title: feat(feishu): include reply context in comment auto replies
target.body:
## Summary

- Carry Feishu comment reply context from comment-event dispatch and outbound comment-thread delivery into Drive comment writes.
- Include `extra` on comment auto-reply add/reply requests with `refer_reply_id` and `ai_reply_source_type`.
- Preserve large numeric reply ids as JSON number text inside the `extra` string without converting them through JS `Number`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/comment-dispatcher.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts` - 3 files passed, 60 tests passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu comment auto replies now keep the source reply context when creating comment replies or whole-document follow-up comments.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout with Feishu plugin unit coverage.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/feishu/src/drive.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/comment-dispatcher.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/outbound.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: Tests assert dispatcher/outbound pass auto-reply context and Drive request bodies include the expected `extra` string, including an int64 `refer_reply_id` emitted as numeric JSON text.
Observed result after fix: `3 passed (3)`, `60 passed (60)`.
What was not tested: No live Feishu OpenAPI call was made in this PR; live behavior was validated separately before removing temporary debug logging.
